title: Can I send/receive texts in Monday using a DialPad/Zapier integration?
excerpt: We would like to be able to send and receive texts in through Monday using DialPad, and we’re wondering if our Zapier integration will allow us to do that. We can currently make calls from Monday through DialPad, but tex…

posts.author: vrogers (Valerie Rogers)
posts.cookedHtml:
We would like to be able to send and receive texts in through Monday using DialPad, and we’re wondering if our Zapier integration will allow us to do that. We can currently make calls from Monday through DialPad, but texting capability would really be helpful (without having to add a whole new app like Twilio).

Any insights would be appreciated.

posts.author: RonWoodRealtor (Ron Wood)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you ever get an answer to this question? I need the same integration. I just signed up for Dialpad and really like it. Thank you

posts.author: allshane (Shane Carslake)
posts.cookedHtml: We need a Dialpad X Monday.com integration as well!

posts.author: benhowes (Ben Howes 🐨)
posts.cookedHtml:
For folks coming from google - I am the creator of the first Dialpad integration with monday.com (See: Dialpad Integration - monday.com Marketplace)

I am interested to talk to folks who want to be able to send/recieve SMS via Dialpad since it is something that could be added to the app if I can better understand what people need from it. Reach out to me on support@capablekoala.co to discuss.
